x_bar.description: The observed sample mean annual salary of 20 female hospital administrators, located on the horizontal axis of the sampling distribution.

n.description: Sample size of the female hospital administrators, used to compute the standard error.

mu.description: Published population mean salary of hospital administrators, used as the center of the sampling distribution under the null hypothesis.

sigma.description: Published population standard deviation of hospital administrator salaries, used to compute the standard error.
